text: Any person may appeal to the Supreme Court from any decree (other than a decree nisi) or order under this Act of a High Court made on’ appeal or otherwise, and from any decree (other than a decree nisi) or order made in the exercise of original jurisdiction by Judges of a High Court or of any Division Court from which an appeal shall not lie to the High Court, when the High Court declares that the case is a fit one for appeal to the Supreme Court.
